using DataAccess.Common;
using DataAccess.DTOs;
using DataAccess.Services;
using DataAccess.Services.Messaging;
using Radio.Messaging;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Controls.Primitives;

namespace Radio.Views.Users
{
    /// <summary>
    /// ???? ????? ?????????? — ???? ????? ?????????? ?? ??????? ??????? ???????? ??????/????? ????????.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class UsersView : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IUserService _userService;
        private readonly UserSession _session;

        public UsersView(IUserService userService, UserSession session)
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            _userService = userService;
            _session = session;

            // ? AppPermissions ????? ?? ??? IsAdmin ??????
            BtnAddUser.Visibility = _session.HasPermission(AppPermissions.UserManage)
                ? Visibility.Visible
                : Visibility.Collapsed;

            // ? Loaded ????? ?? Fire-and-Forget
            Loaded += async (_, _) => await LoadDataAsync();
        }

        #region Data Loading

        /// <summary>
        /// ????? ????? ?????????? ?????? ???? DataGrid ?? ????? ??????????.
        /// </summary>
        private async Task LoadDataAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                var users = await _userService.GetAllUsersAsync();
                DgUsers.ItemsSource = users;
                UpdateStats();
            }
            catch (InvalidOperationException ex)
            {
                MessageService.Current.ShowWarning(ex.Message);
            }
            catch (Exception)
            {
                MessageService.Current.ShowError("??? ??? ??? ????? ????? ????? ????? ??????????.");
            }
        }

        #endregion

        #region CRUD Operations

        /// <summary>
        /// ??? ????? ????? ?????? ????.
        /// </summary>
        private async void BtnAddUser_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            var mainWindow = Window.GetWindow(this) as ModernMainWindow;
            if (mainWindow != null) await mainWindow.ShowOverlay();

            try
            {
                var dialog = new UserFormDialog(null, _userService, _session);
                dialog.Owner = mainWindow;
                if (dialog.ShowDialog() == true)
                {
                    MessageService.Current.ShowSuccess(Messages.Actioned("?????", "????????"));
                    await LoadDataAsync();
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                if (mainWindow != null) await mainWindow.HideOverlay();
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// ??? ????? ????? ?????? ?????? ?????.
        /// </summary>
        private async void BtnEdit_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is not Button btn || btn.DataContext is not UserDto user)
                return;

            var mainWindow = Window.GetWindow(this) as ModernMainWindow;
            if (mainWindow != null) await mainWindow.ShowOverlay();

            try
            {
                var dialog = new UserFormDialog(user, _userService, _session);
                dialog.Owner = mainWindow;
                if (dialog.ShowDialog() == true)
                {
                    MessageService.Current.ShowSuccess(Messages.Updated("????????", user.FullName));
                    await LoadDataAsync();
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                if (mainWindow != null) await mainWindow.HideOverlay();
            }
        }

        #endregion

        #region Status Toggle

        /// <summary>
        /// ????? ?? ????? ???? ?????? ?? ?????? ???? ???? ???? ??????? ????????.
        /// </summary>
        private async void Status_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            // ? DTO ????? ?? Entity
            if (sender is not ToggleButton toggle || toggle.DataContext is not UserDto user)
                return;

            bool newStatus = toggle.IsChecked ?? false;

            try
            {
                var result = await _userService.ToggleUserStatusAsync(user.UserId, newStatus, _session);
                if (result.IsSuccess)
                {
                    MessageService.Current.ShowSuccess(
                        newStatus
                            ? Messages.ActionedWithName("?????", "????????", user.FullName)
                            : Messages.ActionedWithName("?????", "????????", user.FullName));
                }
                else
                {
                    MessageService.Current.ShowWarning(result.ErrorMessage ?? "???? ???????.");
                    toggle.IsChecked = !newStatus;
                }
            }
            catch (Exception)
            {
                MessageService.Current.ShowError("??? ??? ??? ????? ????? ????? ???? ????????.");
                toggle.IsChecked = !newStatus;
            }
            finally
            {
                await LoadDataAsync();
            }
        }

        #endregion

        #region Stats

        /// <summary>
        /// ????? ???????? ?????????? (???????? / ????? / ???????).
        /// </summary>
        private void UpdateStats()
        {
            if (DgUsers.ItemsSource is not IEnumerable<UserDto> users)
                return;

            var list = users.ToList();
            TxtTotalUsers.Text = list.Count.ToString();
            TxtActiveUsers.Text = list.Count(u => u.IsActive).ToString();
            TxtInactiveUsers.Text = list.Count(u => !u.IsActive).ToString();
        }

        #endregion

        private async void BtnDelete_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is Button btn && btn.DataContext is UserDto user)
            {
                bool isConfirmed = await MessageService.Current.ShowConfirmationAsync(
                $"?? ??? ????? ?? ????? ???? ????????: {user.FullName}?\n?? ???? ??????? ?? ??? ???????.",
                "????? ?????");

                if (!isConfirmed)
                    return;
                try
                {
                    var result = await _userService.DeleteUserAsync(user.UserId, _session);
                    if (result.IsSuccess)
                    {
                        await LoadDataAsync();
                        MessageService.Current.ShowSuccess(Messages.Deleted("????????", user.FullName));
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        MessageService.Current.ShowWarning(result.ErrorMessage ?? "??? ?????.");
                    }
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    MessageService.Current.ShowError("??? ?????: " + ex.Message);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

=========================================
FILE: \Ui\Themes\ThemeTransitionHelper.cs
=========================================

using System.Threading.Tasks; 
using System.Windows; 
using System.Windows.Media.Animation; 

namespace Ui.Themes { 
    public static class ThemeTransitionHelper { 
        public static async Task AnimateThemeSwitchAsync(FrameworkElement target, ThemeManager.ThemeMode mode, int fadeOutMs = 150, int fadeInMs = 200) { 
            if (target == null) { ThemeManager.ApplyTheme(mode); return; } 
            var fadeOut = new DoubleAnimation(1.0, 0.0, new Duration(System.TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(fadeOutMs))) { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } }; 
            target.BeginAnimation(UIElement.OpacityProperty, fadeOut); 
            await Task.Delay(fadeOutMs + 50); 
            ThemeManager.ApplyTheme(mode); 
            var fadeIn = new DoubleAnimation(0.0, 1.0, new Duration(System.TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(fadeInMs))) { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseIn } }; 
            target.BeginAnimation(UIElement.OpacityProperty, fadeIn); 
            await Task.Delay(fadeInMs); 
        } 
        public static async Task AnimateDialogOpenAsync(FrameworkElement dialog, int durationMs = 250) { 
            dialog.Opacity = 0; 
            dialog.RenderTransform = new System.Windows.Media.ScaleTransform(0.95, 0.95, 0.5, 0.5); 
            dialog.RenderTransformOrigin = new Point(0.5, 0.5); 
            var fadeIn = new DoubleAnimation(0, 1, new Duration(System.TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(durationMs))) { EasingFunction = new CircleEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } }; 
            var scaleUp = new DoubleAnimation(0.95, 1.0, new Duration(System.TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(durationMs))) { EasingFunction = new BackEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut, Amplitude = 0.1 } }; 
            dialog.BeginAnimation(UIElement.OpacityProperty, fadeIn); 
            dialog.RenderTransform.BeginAnimation(System.Windows.Media.ScaleTransform.ScaleXProperty, scaleUp); 
            dialog.RenderTransform.BeginAnimation(System.Windows.Media.ScaleTransform.ScaleYProperty, scaleUp); 
            await Task.Delay(durationMs); 
        } 
    } 
}

        ---------------------------------------------------------------
    -->

        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource SurfaceContainerBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="Height" Value="80" />
        <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="28,28,0,0" />
        <Setter Property="Effect" Value="{DynamicResource Shadow.Elevation3}" />
    </Style>

    <!--  -- BottomNav.Item — Single nav item --  -->
    <Style x:Key="BottomNav.Item" TargetType="RadioButton">
        <Setter Property="Width" Value="80" />
        <Setter Property="Height" Value="56" />
        <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent" />
        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource OnSurfaceVariantBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12" />
        <Setter Property="FontFamily" Value="{DynamicResource Font.Primary}" />
        <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand" />
        <Setter Property="Template">
            <Setter.Value>
                <ControlTemplate TargetType="RadioButton">
                    <Grid>
                        <!-- Active Indicator Pill -->
                        <Rectangle x:Name="Indicator"
                                   RadiusX="16"
                                   RadiusY="16"
                                   Fill="{DynamicResource PrimaryContainerBrush}"
                                   Opacity="0"
                                   Margin="4,0"
                                   Height="32" />
                        
                        <!-- Content Stack -->
                        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                            <ContentPresenter x:Name="IconPresenter"
                                              HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                              Width="24" Height="24" />
                            <TextBlock x:Name="Label"
                                       Text="{TemplateBinding Content}"
                                       FontSize="12"
                                       FontWeight="Medium"
                                       Margin="0,2,0,0"
                                       HorizontalAlignment="Center" />
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>
                    <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                        <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="True">
                            <Setter TargetName="Indicator" Property="Opacity" Value="1" />
                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource OnPrimaryContainerBrush}" />
                        </Trigger>
                        <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                            <Setter TargetName="Indicator" Property="Fill" Value="{DynamicResource SurfaceContainerHighBrush}" />
                            <Setter TargetName="Indicator" Property="Opacity" Value="1" />
                        </Trigger>
                        <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                            <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="{DynamicResource State.DisabledOpacity}" />
                        </Trigger>
                    </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                </ControlTemplate>
            </Setter.Value>
        </Setter>
    </Style>

</ResourceDictionary>

<ResourceDictionary xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
                    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
                    xmlns:md="http://materialdesigninxaml.net/winfx/xaml/themes">

    <!--
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Segmented Buttons — Material Design 3
        Naming: SegBtn.{Variant}
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
    -->

    <!--  -- SegBtn.Container — Groups the segments --  -->
    <Style x:Key="SegBtn.Container" TargetType="Border">
        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource SurfaceContainerHighBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="20" />
        <Setter Property="Height" Value="40" />
    </Style>

    <!--  -- SegBtn.Item — Single segment (RadioButton) --  -->
    <Style x:Key="SegBtn.Item" TargetType="RadioButton">
        <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent" />
        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource OnSurfaceVariantBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="Padding" Value="16,0" />
        <Setter Property="FontFamily" Value="{DynamicResource Font.Primary}" />
        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14" />
        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Medium" />
        <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand" />
        <Setter Property="Template">
            <Setter.Value>
                <ControlTemplate TargetType="RadioButton">
                    <Border x:Name="Container"
                            CornerRadius="20"
                            Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                            BorderBrush="{DynamicResource OutlineBrush}"
                            BorderThickness="1">
                        <ContentPresenter x:Name="Content"
                                          HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                          VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                          Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}" />
                    </Border>
                    <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                        <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="True">
                            <Setter TargetName="Container" Property="Background"
                                    Value="{DynamicResource SecondaryContainerBrush}" />
                            <Setter Property="Foreground"
                                    Value="{DynamicResource OnSecondaryContainerBrush}" />
                        </Trigger>
                        <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                            <Trigger.EnterActions>
                                <BeginStoryboard>
                                    <Storyboard>
                                        <ColorAnimation Storyboard.TargetName="Container"
                                                         Storyboard.TargetProperty="Background.Color"
                                                         To="#1A000000"
                                                         Duration="0:0:0.15" />
                                    </Storyboard>
                                </BeginStoryboard>
                            </Trigger.EnterActions>
                        </Trigger>
                        <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
                            <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="{DynamicResource State.DisabledOpacity}" />
                        </Trigger>
                    </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                </ControlTemplate>
            </Setter.Value>
        </Setter>
    </Style>

    <!--  -- SegBtn.Item.Multi — For multi-select (CheckBox-based) --  -->
    <Style x:Key="SegBtn.Item.Multi" TargetType="CheckBox">
        <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent" />
        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource OnSurfaceVariantBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="Padding" Value="16,0" />
        <Setter Property="FontFamily" Value="{DynamicResource Font.Primary}" />
        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14" />
        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Medium" />
        <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand" />
        <Setter Property="Template">
            <Setter.Value>
                <ControlTemplate TargetType="CheckBox">
                    <Border x:Name="Container"
                            CornerRadius="20"
                            Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                            BorderBrush="{DynamicResource OutlineBrush}"
                            BorderThickness="1">
                        <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                          VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                          Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}" />
                    </Border>
                    <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                        <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="True">
                            <Setter TargetName="Container" Property="Background"
                                    Value="{DynamicResource SecondaryContainerBrush}" />
                            <Setter Property="Foreground"
                                    Value="{DynamicResource OnSecondaryContainerBrush}" />
                        </Trigger>
                    </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                </ControlTemplate>
            </Setter.Value>
        </Setter>
    </Style>

</ResourceDictionary>

<ResourceDictionary xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
                    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
                    xmlns:md="http://materialdesigninxaml.net/winfx/xaml/themes">

    <!--
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Snackbar Styles — Material Design 3
        Naming: Snack.{Variant}
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
    -->

    <!--  -- Snack.Container — Snackbar background --  -->
    <Style x:Key="Snack.Container" TargetType="Border">
        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource InverseSurfaceBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource InverseOnSurfaceBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="8" />
        <Setter Property="Padding" Value="16,12" />
        <Setter Property="MinHeight" Value="48" />
        <Setter Property="Effect" Value="{DynamicResource Shadow.Elevation3}" />
    </Style>

    <!--  -- Snack.Text — Message text --  -->
    <Style x:Key="Snack.Text" TargetType="TextBlock">
        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource InverseOnSurfaceBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="{DynamicResource Type.Body.Medium}" />
        <Setter Property="FontFamily" Value="{DynamicResource Font.Primary}" />
        <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center" />
        <Setter Property="TextWrapping" Value="Wrap" />
    </Style>

    <!--  -- Snack.ActionBtn — Action button in snackbar --  -->
    <Style x:Key="Snack.ActionBtn" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource Btn.Text}">
        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource InversePrimaryBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Medium" />
        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="{DynamicResource Type.Label.Large}" />
        <Setter Property="MinWidth" Value="Auto" />
        <Setter Property="Height" Value="Auto" />
        <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,0" />
        <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand" />
    </Style>

    <!--  -- Snack.DismissBtn — Dismiss icon button --  -->
    <Style x:Key="Snack.DismissBtn" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource Btn.Icon}">
        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource InverseOnSurfaceBrush}" />
        <Setter Property="Width" Value="32" />
        <Setter Property="Height" Value="32" />
        <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.7" />
        <Style.Triggers>
            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="1" />
            </Trigger>
        </Style.Triggers>
    </Style>

</ResourceDictionary>

FILE: \Ui\Themes\Styles\Trans.xaml
=========================================

<ResourceDictionary xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
                    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
                    xmlns:md="http://materialdesigninxaml.net/winfx/xaml/themes">

    <!--
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
        Transition / Animation Helper Styles
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
    -->

    <!-- Default page transition storyboard (fade) -->
    <Storyboard x:Key="Transition.FadeIn">
        <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="Opacity"
                         From="0"
                         To="1"
                         Duration="{DynamicResource Duration.PageTransition}"
                         EasingFunction="{StaticResource Ease.Out}" />
    </Storyboard>

    <Storyboard x:Key="Transition.FadeOut">
        <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="Opacity"
                         From="1"
                         To="0"
                         Duration="{StaticResource Duration.Medium1}"
                         EasingFunction="{StaticResource Ease.In}" />
    </Storyboard>

    <!-- Slide up transition (for dialogs/snackbars) -->
    <Storyboard x:Key="Transition.SlideUp">
        <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="RenderTransform.Y"
                         From="20"
                         To="0"
                         Duration="{StaticResource Duration.Medium2}"
                         EasingFunction="{StaticResource Ease.Out}" />
        <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="Opacity"
                         From="0"
                         To="1"
                         Duration="{StaticResource Duration.Medium2}" />
    </Storyboard>

    <!-- Scale up transition (for FAB/dropdowns) -->
    <Storyboard x:Key="Transition.ScaleUp">
        <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="RenderTransform.ScaleX"
                         From="0.8"
                         To="1"
                         Duration="{StaticResource Duration.Medium1}"
                         EasingFunction="{StaticResource Ease.BackOut}" />
        <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="RenderTransform.ScaleY"
                         From="0.8"
                         To="1"
                         Duration="{StaticResource Duration.Medium1}"
                         EasingFunction="{StaticResource Ease.BackOut}" />
        <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="Opacity"
                         From="0"
                         To="1"
                         Duration="{StaticResource Duration.Medium1}" />
    </Storyboard>

</ResourceDictionary>

FILE: \Ui\Themes\System\Animations.xaml
=========================================

<ResourceDictionary xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
                    xmlns:system="clr-namespace:System;assembly=mscorlib">

    <!--
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
        MD3 Motion System
        Duration tokens + Easing functions + Component mappings
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
    -->

    <!--  -- Base Duration Tokens --  -->
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Short1">0:0:0.05</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Short2">0:0:0.1</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Medium1">0:0:0.15</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Medium2">0:0:0.25</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Long1">0:0:0.35</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Long2">0:0:0.5</Duration>

    <!--  -- Easing Functions --  -->
    <CubicEase x:Key="Ease.In" EasingMode="EaseIn" />
    <CubicEase x:Key="Ease.Out" EasingMode="EaseOut" />
    <CubicEase x:Key="Ease.InOut" EasingMode="EaseInOut" />
    <CircleEase x:Key="Ease.CircleOut" EasingMode="EaseOut" />
    <BackEase x:Key="Ease.BackOut" EasingMode="EaseOut" Amplitude="0.3" />
    <ElasticEase x:Key="Ease.Elastic" EasingMode="EaseOut" Oscillations="1" Springiness="3" />

    <!--  -- Component-Specific Durations --  -->
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Hover">0:0:0.15</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Focus">0:0:0.1</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Press">0:0:0.05</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.Ripple">0:0:0.35</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.ThemeTransition">0:0:0.4</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.PageTransition">0:0:0.3</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.DialogEnter">0:0:0.25</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.DialogExit">0:0:0.2</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.SnackbarEnter">0:0:0.25</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.SnackbarExit">0:0:0.15</Duration>
    <Duration x:Key="Duration.ProgressAnimation">0:0:1.5</Duration>

</ResourceDictionary>

FILE: \Ui\Themes\System\Shadows.xaml
=========================================

<ResourceDictionary xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
                    xmlns:system="clr-namespace:System;assembly=mscorlib">

    <!--
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
        MD3 Layered Shadow System
        Each elevation has a primary + ambient shadow effect
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
    -->

    <!--  -- Elevation 1: Subtle (Cards, Buttons) --  -->
    <DropShadowEffect x:Key="Shadow.Elevation1"
                       Direction="270"
                       ShadowDepth="1"
                       BlurRadius="3"
                       Opacity="0.3"
                       Color="{DynamicResource Shadow}" />

    <!--  -- Elevation 2: Light (Dropdowns, Menus) --  -->
    <DropShadowEffect x:Key="Shadow.Elevation2"
                       Direction="270"
                       ShadowDepth="3"
                       BlurRadius="8"
                       Opacity="0.3"
                       Color="{DynamicResource Shadow}" />

    <!--  -- Elevation 3: Medium (FAB, Dialogs) --  -->
    <DropShadowEffect x:Key="Shadow.Elevation3"
                       Direction="270"
                       ShadowDepth="6"
                       BlurRadius="14"
                       Opacity="0.25"
                       Color="{DynamicResource Shadow}" />

    <!--  -- Elevation 4: High (Nav Drawer, Snackbar) --  -->
    <DropShadowEffect x:Key="Shadow.Elevation4"
                       Direction="270"
                       ShadowDepth="8"
                       BlurRadius="20"
                       Opacity="0.25"
                       Color="{DynamicResource Shadow}" />

    <!--  -- Elevation 5: Highest (Modals, Pickers) --  -->
    <DropShadowEffect x:Key="Shadow.Elevation5"
                       Direction="270"
                       ShadowDepth="12"
                       BlurRadius="28"
                       Opacity="0.2"
                       Color="{DynamicResource Shadow}" />

</ResourceDictionary>

<ResourceDictionary xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
                    xmlns:system="clr-namespace:System;assembly=mscorlib">

    <!--
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
        MD3 Typography System
        Complete type scale + font families + weights + tracking
        ---------------------------------------------------------------
    -->

    <!--  -- Font Family Tokens --  -->
    <FontFamily x:Key="Font.Primary">Segoe UI</FontFamily>
    <FontFamily x:Key="Font.Mono">Cascadia Code, Consolas</FontFamily>
    <FontFamily x:Key="Font.Arabic">Segoe UI, Traditional Arabic</FontFamily>
    <FontFamily x:Key="Font.Icon">Segoe Fluent Icons, Segoe MDL2 Assets</FontFamily>

    <!--  -- Font Weight Tokens --  -->
    <FontWeight x:Key="FontWeight.Thin">Thin</FontWeight>
    <FontWeight x:Key="FontWeight.Light">Light</FontWeight>
    <FontWeight x:Key="FontWeight.Regular">Normal</FontWeight>
    <FontWeight x:Key="FontWeight.Medium">Medium</FontWeight>
    <FontWeight x:Key="FontWeight.SemiBold">SemiBold</FontWeight>

    <!--  -- Type Scale: Body --  -->

    <system:Double x:Key="Type.Body.Small">12</system:Double>

    <!--  -- Type Scale: Label --  -->

    <system:Double x:Key="Type.Label.Small">11</system:Double>

    <!--  -- Line Height Tokens --  -->
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Display.Large">64</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Display.Medium">52</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Display.Small">44</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Headline.Large">40</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Headline.Medium">36</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Headline.Small">32</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Title.Large">28</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Title.Medium">24</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Title.Small">20</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Body.Large">24</system:Double>
    <system:Double x:Key="LineHeight.Body.Medium">20</system:Double>
